component.name: ztox
component.summary: Privacy-first Tox messenger with a Nord aesthetic.

description.p: ztox is a Tox messenger client derived from qTox, with stronger anonymity defaults and a coherent Nord visual style.

ul.li: UDP and LAN discovery off by default — your IP is not leaked to peers.
Local group-chat archive so leaving and rejoining does not erase history.

description.p: Tox is a peer-to-peer protocol with end-to-end encryption and no central server. ztox does not modify the protocol — it ships safer defaults and a friendlier interface on top of it.
